Method.Name: calculateTotalForMainAccounts
getMainAccountDetails
initializeMainAccount
processReport
insertData
Method.Source: public void insertData() { insert_recordset gmrTableTempNew ( ETGSalesId, InvoiceAccount, InvoiceDate, Party, ItemId, Name, SubVertical, Vertical, SalesQty, SalesUnit, ORIGIN, InvoiceDateMonth, ContactPersonId, LineAmount, AccountNum, QtyinMT, DESTINATION, SalesDiscount, PurchDiscount, DirectCost, SDCost, TotalCost, RealisedExchAdjustment, Depreciation, AdminCostOpBankCharges, OtherFinanceCosts, IncomeOrExpenseInLC, SalesParty, Month, TransDate, ETGMonth, ETGMT, InventoryFinancialQty, ContractNo, LineDisc, MmFV, MmSIT, OtherFinanceCostsLC, InsuranceClaimRecId, SpecificCost, GC, AdminCostAndBankCharges, CostStaff, UnrealizedForex, OtherCost, EBITDA, InterestIncome, InterestExpense, NetEBITDA, RealisedExchangeAdjustment, PurchaseCost, ContractQty, InvoiceQty, MainCommodity, SubCommodity, ItemDesc, AgreementNum ) select ETGSalesId, InvoiceAccount, InvoiceDate, Party, ItemId, Name, SubVertical, Vertical, SalesQty, SalesUnit, ORIGIN, InvoiceDateMonth, ContactPersonId, LineAmount, AccountNum, QtyinMT, DESTINATION, SalesDiscount, PurchDiscount, DirectCost, SDCost, TotalCost, RealisedExchAdjustment, Depreciation, AdminCostOpBankCharges, OtherFinanceCosts, IncomeOrExpenseInLC, SalesParty, Month, TransDate, ETGMonth, ETGMT, InventoryFinancialQty, ContractNo, LineDisc, MmFV, MmSIT, OtherFinanceCostsLC, InsuranceClaimRecId, SpecificCost, GC, AdminCostAndBankCharges, CostStaff, UnrealizedForex, OtherCost, EBITDA, InterestIncome, InterestExpense, NetEBITDA, RealisedExchangeAdjustment, PurchaseCost, ContractQty, InvoiceQty, MainCommodity, SubCommodity, ItemDesc, AgreementNum from etggmctableTemp; }

Method.Name: groupByNonInvoiceData
